cropControls.instructions: Displayed photos use a CSS custom property on the figure: style="--media-position: center 35%;". Change the horizontal and vertical percentages to keep faces in frame. Hero photos use a 4:5 crop, About uses 3:4, and gallery previews use 4:5. Never set an image width and height that conflicts with its component aspect ratio.

instructions: Keep performanceVideo.enabled false until a real professional video URL and poster are supplied. Add approved image paths to the portrait and gallery fields, then replace the commented media slots in index.html. A future /watch page should read this configuration and should not be linked or indexed while enabled is false.
